title: Tokenizing & Padding Reviews
concept: Splitting reviews into words, applying subword BPE tokenization, and padding sequences to a fixed length.

exercises.prompt: What is the main goal of a sentiment analyzer?

options.text: To classify text reviews as positive or negative
To translate the reviews into other languages

exercises.explain: The main goal of a sentiment analyzer is to classify text reviews as positive or negative.

cards.title: What is Tokenization?
cards.body: Tokenization is the process of breaking down text into smaller pieces, called tokens. In our case, tokens will usually be words or subwords.

cards.title: Tokenization Definition
cards.body: Tokenization is the method of splitting text into individual words or tokens. It helps computers understand and analyze the text more effectively.

cards.title: Think of it Like Puzzles!
cards.body: Imagine a sentence is a big puzzle. Tokenization is like taking that puzzle apart, piece by piece, so we can look closely at each piece.

cards.title: Example of Tokenization
cards.body: For the sentence 'I love ice cream', tokenization would result in the tokens: ['I', 'love', 'ice', 'cream'].

cards.title: Myth: Tokenization is Easy!
cards.body: Many think tokenization is simple, but it can be tricky, especially with slang or special characters!

cards.title: Tokenization vs. Not Tokenization
cards.body: See how tokenization helps break sentences apart for easier analysis?

left.text: Sentence: 'I love ice cream' is intact.

exercises.prompt: What does padding do to sequences?

options.text: It adds extra spaces to the words.
It makes sequences the same length by adding zeros or special tokens.
It removes unnecessary words from the text.
It combines multiple reviews into one.

exercises.explain: Padding makes sequences uniform in length by adding zeros or special tokens, so they can be processed easily.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Tokenization can make analyzing text easier.
exercises.explain: True! Tokenization simplifies the text, making it easier to analyze.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: Tokenization splits text into smaller pieces called ______.
exercises.sentence: Tokenization splits text into smaller pieces called tokens.
exercises.explain: The correct term is 'tokens', which refers to the smaller pieces generated through tokenization.

exercises.prompt: Which sentence shows the effect of tokenization correctly?
exercises.explain: The correct answer is option 2 because it shows how tokenization separates words and punctuation.

exercises.prompt: What are two main steps you need to perform on text reviews for processing in a sentiment analyzer?
exercises.explain: The two main steps are tokenization, which breaks the text into manageable pieces, and padding, which ensures every sequence has the same length for analysis.
